calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2004 Vacated

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mr. McKay appeared this day in Dept. 206 for a fee waiver hearing which was inadvertantly not calendared; Mr. McKay was notified that the hearing WILL take place later than 9:00 a.m. He then advised the clerk that he is going to pay his filing fees and the matter should be taken off calendar. He also stated that be will be attending the settlement conference this afternoon.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha.
Appearances: J. Sacramento, Esq. represented the Plaintiff, Oliver Sit, et al.
Defendant: Alex McKay, present in pro per.
Matter has beeen settled, terms not read into record.
Settlement Conference is taken off-calendar, Trial vacated.
